name: Case Study
history: Past traumatic incident involving sexual assault by partner Ivan. Ongoing relationship difficulties involving trust and intimacy. Reports some improvement in relationship dynamics with Ivan making efforts to rebuild trust.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must be careful around men because they might hurt me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't trust myself to make the right decisions.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of situations that require trust in others, especially men.
situation: Physical intimacy is resuming in the relationship.
auto_thought: What if he hurts me again?
behavior: Hesitation and withdrawal from physical intimacy.
